stories.headline: Trump threatens to 'blow up' Oman over Strait of Hormuz control

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: PRESIDENT TRUMP: The Strait is going to be open to everybody. It’s international waters. We’ll watch over it, but nobody’s going to control it. Oman will behave like everybody else or we’ll have to blow them up. They understand that.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: We are so far into "mad king" territory that the White House may not even bother to clarify whether Trump just confused Oman with Iran or is indeed threatening to bomb Oman

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: JUST IN: 🇮🇷🇴🇲 Iran says it stands with Oman after US threatened to bomb them. 🇺🇸 President Trump yesterday: "Oman will behave just like everybody else or we'll have to blow them up."

stories.headline: Trump administration cracks down on hundreds of billions in federal fraud including Medicare and PPP loans

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 Stephen Miller says the scale of welfare fraud is SO MASSIVE that eliminating it alone could balance the ENTIRE federal budget "The amount that has been fleeced from us is in the HUNDREDS OF BILLIONS of dollars." "We could balance the federal budget if the only dollars that went out of the treasury went to individuals who were properly, lawfully, correctly eligible to receive them." This should infuriate EVERY taxpayer.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🚨 HOLY SMOKES. Trump SBA chief Kelly Loeffler exposes in the Cabinet room she found $200 BILLION in FRAUDULENT PPP loans distributed by the Biden admin... and they tried COVERING IT UP. People are now going to jail 🔥

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Crushing BILLIONS of dollars in medicare, hospice, childcare and many more types of FRAUD. The Trump Administration is bringing accountability and justice back to the American taxpayer.

stories.headline: Trump Administration recovers billions in Medicare and other federal fraud

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Since @WHFraudTF launched, BILLIONS have already been recovered in taxpayer dollars. The Trump Admin will keep fighting until every fraud scheme is exposed, every dollar possible is clawed back, and trust is restored. 🇺🇸

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: When politicians allow fraud to run rampant, normal Americans suffer.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Trump is now bragging over doctors being so concerned with his cognitive decline that he was given 3 dementia tests in a year and Obama/Biden were given 0. Not the brag you think it is, Donald!

stories.body: The Justice Department has launched a criminal investigation into E. Jean Carroll, who accused Trump of sexual assault, according to sources https://www.cnn.com/2026/05/27/politics/exclusive-justice-department-launched-e-jean-carroll-investigation?Date=20260527&Profile=CNN&utm_content=1779924016&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

stories.headline: Justice Dept. opens investigation into E. Jean Carroll
stories.body: Breaking News: The Justice Dept. is said to have opened an investigation into E. Jean Carroll, who had accused Donald Trump of rape. In her civil case against him, a jury had found Trump liable for sexually abusing and defaming Carroll. https://www.nytimes.com/2026/05/27/us/politics/criminal-inquiry-e-jean-carroll-trump-accusations.html?smid=tw-nytimes&smtyp=cur

stories.headline: The U.S. will need years to replenish stockpiles of key weapons used in the Iran war.
stories.body: The U.S. will need years to replenish stockpiles of key weapons used in the Iran war, potentially limiting firepower in any other conflict, a new analysis says.

stories.headline: Update on Julián Álvarez transfer bid from Manchester City
stories.body:
🚨🔵🔴 More on Julián Álvarez story reported earlier: the official bid has not been submitted yet, it will be sent in the next days.

It will NOT include any players as revealed, and final fee will be clarified as soon as it’s sent (could be in the region of €100m).

stories.headline: Arsenal transfer strategy and UCL final preparations update
stories.body:
Morning Arsenal fans

The clubs is clear about any sellable players be it Jesus Fabio or anyone else. Pay up a “respectable” fee or fuck off. Our sale strategy will be strong and hard-lined this summer, If im around post UCL I will explain it (& other transfer news)

RE Timber - He completed a full session and felt good yesterday which is the most important thing. Final session today before a decision is made on him, I trust the player and Mikel fully on whatever they decide. Wait on my update on this matter. 

Also, I saw some nonsense about us not being locked in? I saw some PSG accounts deluding themselves into thinking we are in party mode? I assure you Arteta has this group on demon time. Arsenal have been training again since Tuesday. 

Its business as usual and I also know they have been preparing for PSG for over 10 days or so now. We all know who the players wanted for the final… be humble but be confident. They fly out later today and continue preparations in Budapest with enough time.

To any Arsenal fans in Budapest, be safe.
God bless.

stories.headline: SpaceX developing in-house AI training stack in C for massive speed gains.
stories.body:
SpaceX has almost finished writing V1.0 of an in-house AI training stack in C that exact-maps to 220k GB300s with 800G NICs, making heavy use of pipeline parallelism and getting as close to bare metal as possible.

The potential speed improvement vs JAX for large training runs is over an order of magnitude.

stories.headline: Elon Musk clarifies SpaceX lease terms with Anthropic.
stories.body:
SpaceX has not committed to leasing Colossus for years, although it’s possible that may be what happens.

This is a 180 day lease with 90 day notice mutual cancellation thereafter. The short term was our request, not Anthropic’s. 

We won’t leave them hanging and will provide a reasonable off-ramp, but if compute gets super tight I said we might need it back at some point.

stories.headline: Lex Fridman shares update on travels in China and upcoming trip to Taiwan.
stories.body:
I've been on a wild travel journey in China for several weeks, with only a backpack, making new friends and meeting & getting to know people from all walks of life. I've been truly humbled and inspired by everyone's kindness.

Next, I'm hopping over to Taiwan (first time for me) to hang out with Jensen, attend Computex, eat a bunch of street food, and just have fun talking to all kinds of folks around the city & beyond. After that, no plans, anything goes.

As always, please give travel suggestions or fill out coffee form if you want to hang out in Taiwain or anywhere else in the world. Love you all! ❤️

stories.headline: AI research lab Trajectory raises $15M for continual learning platform
stories.body:
Today, @MichaelElabd, @QuantumArjun, and I are excited to announce Trajectory.

We are a research lab and product company building the platform for Continual Learning. 

Our platform unlocks the signal already sitting in product usage, so companies can continuously post-train large-scale agentic models that outperform the frontier. @trajectorylabs

We’ve raised $15M from @Conviction, @BessemerVP, @radicalvcfund, @jeffdean, @drfeifei and more.

We’re partnering with some of the best AI-native companies: @ClayRunHQ @Harvey, @DecagonAI, @mercor_ai, @RogoAI to power their agentic systems, some of which we are already in production with.

We’ve brought together a world class research team from DeepMind, OpenAI, Apple, Meta Superintelligence, Amazon AGI, Scale AI, and an elite product team from Stripe and Figma. 

AI will never again start on day one. Every correction, every retry, every edit will make products smarter. This is Continual Learning.

stories.headline: SpaceX employees in Southern California set to become millionaires from IPO.
stories.body:
Ground zero for the SpaceX wealth story is in SoCal. 

~4,000 SpaceX employees will become overnight millionaires in LA

They live in Westchester, Playa Vista, Playa del Rey, El Segundo, and the surrounding South Bay near SpaceX’s El Segundo campus and Hawthorne facilities.
